message:
fix(fr-command): HGETALL emits RESP3 Map type when protocol_version=3 [bd-frankenredis-9itc partial]

Upstream Redis 7.2 returns an alternating-k/v Array in RESP2 and
a real Map (key → value) in RESP3 mode for HGETALL — see
networking.c::addReplyMapLen / addMapForValueOnce. fr's hgetall
always returned Array regardless of session.resp_protocol_version.

When dispatch_client_ctx.resp_protocol_version == 3, emit
RespFrame::Map(Some(entries)) instead of the alternating array.
RESP2 callers (the default) continue to receive the
alternating-array form.

CONFIG GET, XINFO STREAM/GROUPS/CONSUMERS, and CLIENT INFO
remain to be migrated; tracking under the parent bead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
